title: Teaching Pickleball to a Spikeball Player
description: Can a spikeball player translate to pickleball? We put it to the test as Caleb goes from his 4.4–4.5 spikeball level to learning pickleball fundamentals: getting the paddle below the ball, condensing movement to a triangle stance, resetting feet between shots, the rule of three for dinking depth, half-volley technique, ready positioning, and forehand consistency via shoulder-driven motion.
